# PHIL.173 ? Margin of Safety

**Type:** PHILOSOPHY
**Category:** risk_management
**Subcategory:** margin_of_safety

## Core Principles

## Application
Plan conservatively, expect surprises, maintain reserves, avoid fragile dependencies
